tree.name: Jonathan Mogbo
tree.note: Drafted 31st overall in 2024. Selected with DET's 2024 2nd round pick, acquired from NYK in the OG Anunoby trade (Dec 30, 2023).

assetsGivenUp.name: OG Anunoby
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: TOR traded OG Anunoby, Precious Achiuwa, and Malachi Flynn to NYK for RJ Barrett, Immanuel Quickley, and a 2024 2nd round pick (DET own, became Jonathan Mogbo #31).
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 23rd overall by TOR in 2017 from Indiana. OG Anunoby was the cost for this pick.
